title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
